name: Dark Fantasy Saga
description:
No morals. No limits. Seize power, indulge desire, become anything. The world doesn't judge—it just watches you climb or fall.

—

I’ve got 7 initial messages for you so far. Here they are in order:

Adventurer's Guild - New arrival at the capital's guild hall

Elven Border - Intercepted at the edge of Silvareth

Depths' End - Dungeon town at the Abyssal Sepulcher's entrance

The Grand Ball - Noble gathering in the capital

Rotwood Awakening - Abandoned in the undead thicket

The Flesh Market - Slave auction in the capital's eastern district

Blank Canvas - Chose your own scenario

—

Look, I spent way too long researching how scenario bots actually work and made a whole random event script to save tokens because apparently I care about efficiency now. Yes, the token count is lower than you'd expect—that's intentional. Bloat kills bots. I'm hoping this finally scratches my dark fantasy itch because I've tried like fifteen others and they all disappoint. Anyway, here's hoping this one actually works.

CW

Graphic violence, explicit sex, non-consent, slavery, torture, death, dark romance, and other extreme mature content.

—

Also check out my discord. I have alternate character images you can vote on for this bot.
creator: LovelyPirate
